member.name: M:kleos_app_final.Services.StreakService.RecalculateStreakAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Recalculate the streak for a user based on their completed tasks. Returns tuple: (currentStreak, longestStreak)

member.name: M:kleos_app_final.Services.StreakService.UpdateStreakForTodayAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Update streak for today based on the user's completed tasks.

member.name: M:kleos_app_final.Services.StreakService.UpdateStreakForDateAsync(System.Int32,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Update or remove a streak for a date based on how many tasks are completed that day.

member.name: M:kleos_app_final.Services.StreakService.GetCompletedTasksLastNDaysAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get tasks completed for each day in the last N days.

member.name: P:kleos_app_final.ViewModels.BaseViewModel.HasError
member.summary: Returns true if there is an error message to display.

member.name: P:kleos_app_final.ViewModels.BaseViewModel.IsNotLoading
member.summary: Returns true if the view model is not currently loading.

member.name: M:kleos_app_final.ViewModels.BaseViewModel.OnPropertyChanged(System.ComponentModel.PropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Override OnPropertyChanged to notify dependents when computed properties change.

member.name: M:kleos_app_final.ViewModels.EditTaskViewModel.OnTaskIdChanged(System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: T:kleos_app_final.Resource

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
